시편 126:1.content: When Yahweh brought back those who returned to Zion, we were like those who dream.

시편 126:2.content: Then our mouth was filled with laughter, and our tongue with singing. Then they said among the nations, “Yahweh has done great things for them.”

시편 126:3.content: Yahweh has done great things for us, and we are glad.

시편 126:4.content: Restore our fortunes again, Yahweh, like the streams in the Negev.

시편 126:5.content: Those who sow in tears will reap in joy.

시편 126:6.content: He who goes out weeping, carrying seed for sowing, will certainly come again with joy, carrying his sheaves.
